Value: The guy in charge of (CLAN_ON_TILE) has this truly monsterous pimple between his eyes. It makes it... quite difficult to even speak with him.

Value: We're here when you need us.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: This wasn't exactly where we were headed, but I'll be damned if we're going back out there. We'll be staying.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Would rather sit around than have you ask us to do something absurd, which would force me to put my foot down.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Please don't ask where we're from or why we're here. It's... a truly depressing story. You wouldn't want to hear it anyway.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Death is always looming nearer than anyone realizes.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Without anything else to do, it's hard not to get lost in dark thoughts...
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: After talking to a few of your clansman and inspecting the living quarters, we've determined that this could indeed be a suitable home for us.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: We won't need the tour, thank you. We've gone ahead and done a good bit of looking around already.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Better results are obtained by taking the time to make sure one really knows the ins and outs of the task at hand.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: We've begun preparing ourselves for an assignment. Let us know when you have one.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: I can't even remember how many bandits attacked us on the way here. Oh, don't worry, we're fine.[NEWLINE]Now that you mention it though, maybe someone could help remove the arrow from my brother Hanseric's knee?
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: The story's that great great great grandpa (CLAN_NAME) took a bear as a lover. As you can see, the bear blood's been a little watered down now. But still, it really explains some things.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Yeah, yeah, we pledge our loyalty and all that. No need to show us around, just get your maps and bring out your gear.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: The key to a maintaining a strong body is to be constantly pushing yourself to the limit!
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: The world is so small, but c'mon, there's got to be more places to go somewhere!
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: We're ready to head out, so just give us a destination!
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION). Right. We'll get right on it.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Your settlement is weak and vulernable. With the right amount of iron and blood, we can fix that.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: We left no one alive at that last place. Be careful that you don't end up like them.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Have you considered using human heads on sticks to ward off attackers? We will provide the heads.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: All across this world, there is carnage and slaughter. When is it our turn?
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)? Are you kidding? Well, if this is what you need to crush our foes, then so be it.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.
Known player-facing trait label; patched by ID.

Value: We'd left a few supplies behind to lighten our loads, figuring you'd have replacements. Thankfully, we've arrived just in time. A day or so longer and we may have starved...!
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Salvation from the elements awaits us here, I know it!
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: It's a bit disgusting that other clans are always poring through our garbage... Are they starving or something?
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Bacon would be a whole lot better without those fatty bits along the edges. Removing them is a pain.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: There must be some use for us.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)... Not really sure how that works, but let's give it a try.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Phew, we weren't made to live in this kind of weather.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.
Known player-facing trait label; patched by ID.

Value: We heard there's food and drink here. Hmmm. Needs a little more excitement though!
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: So... What's there to do around these parts? C'mon, don't tell us you're stuck up like that last tribe.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: "Clean thyselves?" What?! Yer talking like a Roman.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: They told us to settle down. They told us to wear pants. Heh heh... they won't make that mistake again!
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: We'll be making our own fun since, hell, we ain't got nothing better to do!
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION) huh? Yeah, we should have some fun with that!
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Look no further for a sturdy axe.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: Are you too haunted by visions of nightmarish oaks and spruces? We come to cure this affliction.

Value: Our youngest just felled his first tree!

Value: Where did you sat you put our axes?

Value: (TRAINING_IN_PROFESSION)... Hmm... Yes, we can probably use an axe for that.

Value: Our first home is the forest. Then why are we here? Two is better than one, of course.
Reason: Player-facing clan dialogue under a stable trait ID.

Value: The trees speak. They told us to come here.

Value: Have you ever seen the glimmer of the stars above the forest canopy? No? Good, leave it to us. It's dangerous out there.

Value: These lands could use a few more trees, don't you think?

Value: We are ready to confront the wilds.
